title: Slopking dashboard manifest
description: Contract for a single dashboard that the slopking hub launches and embeds. Drop one slopking.json at the root of each dashboard repo. This file is the runtime/operational view of the dashboard — distinct from CLAUDE.md, which is the coding-agent's view.

manifestVersion.description: Manifest format version. Bump only when the contract changes incompatibly.

id.description: Stable, unique slug. slopking keys its registry on this.

name.description: Human label shown in slopking's UI.

description.description: One or two lines. Reuse the 'What this is' blurb from CLAUDE.md — not the dev sections.

baseUrl.description: Origin the API + UI are served from once running, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8787.

health.description: How slopking decides the dashboard is up. It polls baseUrl + path.

expectJson.description: Optional JSON subset that must match the health response body.

run.description: How slopking starts the dashboard. cmd is run with cwd resolved relative to the manifest's directory.

cwd.description: Working dir relative to the manifest file.

embed.description: How slopking shows the dashboard (Electron BrowserView / iframe / external).

default.description: Landing URL when the dashboard is opened.

deepLink.description: URL template with {placeholders} for deep links, e.g. .../?openApp={applicationId}#/dashboard.

views.description: Named entry points slopking can list as tabs/shortcuts.

ai.description: Optional. Declares an AI capability the dashboard already exposes, so slopking can delegate instead of hosting its own model.

links.description: Pointers for humans / coding agents. agentDoc is where an AG that EDITS this repo should look (e.g. CLAUDE.md) — kept separate from the runtime metadata above.

build.description: Optional one-time build step run before cmd.

cmd.description: Long-running command that serves the dashboard.
